mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fund_application WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fund_application WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fund_application WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fund_application WHERE approval_status = #{approvalStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fund_application ORDER BY create_time DESC
